news.title:
Evonith Steel borrows Rs 1,750 crore to refinance debt, raising Rs 250 crore via NCDs.
AU Small Finance Bank & CheQ launch LED-enabled co-branded credit card with NFC features.
news.summary:
Evonith Steel borrows Rs 1,750 crore to refinance debt, raising Rs 250 crore via NCDs.
AU Small Finance Bank & CheQ launch LED-enabled co-branded credit card with NFC features.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank certifies timely interest payment of Rs. 44.7L on NCDs, ISIN INE519Q08160.
Payment made on April 15, 2026; frequency monthly; no delays or changes reported.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank certifies timely interest payment of Rs. 44.7L on NCDs, ISIN INE519Q08160.
Payment made on April 15, 2026; frequency monthly; no delays or changes reported.

news.title:
CBI investigates Rs 550 crore embezzlement case involving IDFC First Bank and Haryana govt funds.
IDFC First Bank repaid Rs 583 crore to Haryana govt; AU Small Finance Bank also under investigation.
news.summary:
CBI investigates Rs 550 crore embezzlement case involving IDFC First Bank and Haryana govt funds.
IDFC First Bank repaid Rs 583 crore to Haryana govt; AU Small Finance Bank also under investigation.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank's total deposits grew 22.8% YoY to Rs 1.53 lakh crore in Q4.
The stock rose 1.83% to Rs 883.95 following the strong deposit growth.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank's total deposits grew 22.8% YoY to Rs 1.53 lakh crore in Q4.
The stock rose 1.83% to Rs 883.95 following the strong deposit growth.

news.title:
RBL Bank and AU Small Finance Bank showed strong advances and deposits growth, per Motilal Oswal.
RBL shares rose 5.7%, AU Small Finance Bank by 0.4%; tighter liquidity pressures margins.
news.summary:
RBL Bank and AU Small Finance Bank showed strong advances and deposits growth, per Motilal Oswal.
RBL shares rose 5.7%, AU Small Finance Bank by 0.4%; tighter liquidity pressures margins.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank Q4: Deposits rise 22.8% YoY to ₹1.53 lakh cr, advances up 25.1% YoY.
CASA deposits grew 19.6% YoY to ₹43,360 cr, but CASA ratio dropped to 28.4% from 29.2% YoY.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank Q4: Deposits rise 22.8% YoY to ₹1.53 lakh cr, advances up 25.1% YoY.
CASA deposits grew 19.6% YoY to ₹43,360 cr, but CASA ratio dropped to 28.4% from 29.2% YoY.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank Q4 FY26 deposits rose 22.8% YoY to ₹1,52,660 Cr.
Advances increased 25.1% YoY to ₹1,36,040 Cr, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank Q4 FY26 deposits rose 22.8% YoY to ₹1,52,660 Cr.
Advances increased 25.1% YoY to ₹1,36,040 Cr, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank reported 22.8% YoY deposit growth to Rs 1.53 lakh crore.
Gross loan portfolio grew 21.3% YoY to Rs 1.40 lakh crore, including securitised loans.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank reported 22.8% YoY deposit growth to Rs 1.53 lakh crore.
Gross loan portfolio grew 21.3% YoY to Rs 1.40 lakh crore, including securitised loans.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirms AU Small Finance Bank's strong ratings, citing capitalisation, deposit growth, and asset quality.
Rating on some Tier II bonds withdrawn post redemption; stable outlook expects sustained profitability.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirms AU Small Finance Bank's strong ratings, citing capitalisation, deposit growth, and asset quality.
Rating on some Tier II bonds withdrawn post redemption; stable outlook expects sustained profitability.

news.title:
Haryana police deployed outside AU Small Finance Bank and Kotak branches amid probe into unauthorised transactions.
Kotak Mahindra Bank paid ₹120 cr to Haryana govt; investigation into suspected irregularities is ongoing.
news.summary:
Haryana police deployed outside AU Small Finance Bank and Kotak branches amid probe into unauthorised transactions.
Kotak Mahindra Bank paid ₹120 cr to Haryana govt; investigation into suspected irregularities is ongoing.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank fell 1.77%, closing at Rs.883.10, lagging Sensex's 1.46% drop.
Key events included intraday low on 23 March and rising derivatives interest on 25 March.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank fell 1.77%, closing at Rs.883.10, lagging Sensex's 1.46% drop.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank saw a 3.6% gain on 25 Mar 2026.
Open interest surged 17%, signaling heightened market interest and trading.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal forecasts a 34% upside for AU SFB on universal bank transition.
AU SFB underperformed Nifty Bank in 2026; Buy call maintained by Motilal Oswal.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank certifies timely interest payment of Rs. 41.2 lakh on Rs. 50 crore NCDs, due March 9, 2026.
Interest payment was made on schedule, with no delays or changes; last payment was on February 9, 2026.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank certifies timely interest payment of Rs. 41.2 lakh on Rs. 50 crore NCDs, due March 9, 2026.
Interest payment was made on schedule, with no delays or changes; last payment was on February 9, 2026.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relief, marking a significant step toward universal banking transition.
The transition details and implications were explained on ET Now.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relief, marking a significant step toward universal banking transition.
The transition details and implications were explained on ET Now.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relaxation on NOFHC requirement, aiding its transition to Universal Bank status.
Shares traded at Rs. 964.1 on BSE, intraday high Rs. 980.4, turnover Rs. 3.4cr.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relaxation on NOFHC requirement, aiding its transition to Universal Bank status.
Shares traded at Rs. 964.1 on BSE, intraday high Rs. 980.4, turnover Rs. 3.4cr.

news.title:
RBI approves AU Small Finance Bank's transition to a Universal Bank.
NOFHC mandated only if future group entities emerge; final license application pending.
news.summary:
RBI approves AU Small Finance Bank's transition to a Universal Bank.
NOFHC mandated only if future group entities emerge; final license application pending.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.
news.summary:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.
